title: The Field Where Paths Keep Their Secrets

features.name: convergence marker
features.desc-on-touch: the stone where both paths remember choosing to split; each footstep that passed here left its direction in the grass

features.name: wheat-tall-watching
features.desc-on-touch: the crops remember every walker; they bow toward the paths most traveled, holding the shape of forgetting

features.name: secret-kept-in-soil
features.desc-on-touch: something buried here knows both directions; the earth keeps what the paths cannot speak

features.name: returning-corner
features.desc-on-touch: the field has a corner that looks like it's turning back; walkers report the sensation of meeting themselves here

features.name: the-distance-between
features.desc-on-touch: you feel the space between the two paths that once shared direction; it grows wider or closer depending on which way you're facing

inscription: both paths remember leaving here; the grass records which direction you'll choose before you know it

file.name: Footsteps_Both_Directions_SuperimposedRecording.mp3
file.note: two voices walking in opposite directions, recorded on the same path at the same moment in different years; they never acknowledge each other

exits.label: back to where the paths still held one shape
the path that chose to keep walking
toward the ridge where both paths appear at once
into the lowland where choices flatten into a single stream

reverie.title: REVERIE — the field where you walked apart
narr: you stand in the high grass while she walks west
the paths were still one thing and then they weren't
you called after her but the field swallowed it
she turns once at the tree line, hand raised
the grass closes between you like water
